message:
audit: channel/{oneshot,clock_skew,crash,fault,partition} + combinator/circuit_breaker — all SOUND

Deep correctness audits under bd-2wds9:
- channel/oneshot.rs: SOUND (1 LOW advisory: wake-under-lock)
- channel/clock_skew.rs: SOUND (single Mutex + AtomicU64 CAS patterns)
- channel/crash.rs: SOUND (Mutex<CrashState> + AtomicU64 stats)
- channel/fault.rs: SOUND (3 independent Mutex, no nesting)
- channel/partition.rs: SOUND (nested partitions→stats consistent order)
- combinator/circuit_breaker.rs: SOUND (AtomicU64 bitfield state machine, metrics→window lock ordering)

Total: 5,410 lines audited, 0 bugs found, 1 LOW advisory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
